name: fai-pagerduty-plugin
description: Pagerduty integration plugin for FAI — 3 MCP tools, dedicated agent, compatible plays

tools.name: pagerduty_incident_create
tools.description: Create a PagerDuty incident with severity, service, and escalation policy

tools.name: pagerduty_oncall_query
tools.description: Query who is currently on-call for a specific PagerDuty service

tools.name: pagerduty_escalation_trigger
tools.description: Trigger an escalation for an existing PagerDuty incident
